verses.text: The Grecians murmur their widows are neglected; it is not fit to leave the word 'to serve tables.' Wise priority. The apostles guard their chief calling.
The Grecians murmur their widows are neglected; it is not fit to leave the word 'to serve tables.' Wise priority. The apostles guard their chief calling.
Choose seven 'full of the Holy Ghost and wisdom'; we will give ourselves to prayer and the word. Shared work. The church appoints helpers for practical needs.
Choose seven 'full of the Holy Ghost and wisdom'; we will give ourselves to prayer and the word. Shared work. The church appoints helpers for practical needs.
They choose Stephen and six others; the word increases, and 'a great company of the priests' believe. Fruitful order. Good arrangement frees the gospel to spread.
They choose Stephen and six others; the word increases, and 'a great company of the priests' believe. Fruitful order. Good arrangement frees the gospel to spread.
They choose Stephen and six others; the word increases, and 'a great company of the priests' believe. Fruitful order. Good arrangement frees the gospel to spread.
Stephen, full of faith and power, does great wonders; none can resist his wisdom. Spirit-filled. His words carry irresistible truth.
Stephen, full of faith and power, does great wonders; none can resist his wisdom. Spirit-filled. His words carry irresistible truth.
Stephen, full of faith and power, does great wonders; none can resist his wisdom. Spirit-filled. His words carry irresistible truth.
They suborn men to accuse him of blasphemy and seize him. False charges. Slander is the weapon of those who cannot answer.
They suborn men to accuse him of blasphemy and seize him. False charges. Slander is the weapon of those who cannot answer.
False witnesses charge him against the temple and law; 'his face as... the face of an angel.' Shining calm. The Spirit fills him with heavenly peace.
